summary: Phase 2 Construction Accounting CRM testing complete. All backend APIs (8/8 tests passed) and frontend pages (4/4 pages working) for Cashbook, Suspense Account, Smart Payment, and Project Finance features verified.

features_tested.notes: Returns income, expenses, summary with total_income, total_expense, balance, income_by_mode
Creates expense record with project_id, category, amount, payment_method, vendor_name. Verified expense appears in cashbook
Returns petty_cash (balance, issued, spent), material_suspense (total, balances), labour_suspense (total, balances)
Processes payment with smart suspense tracking - excess goes to suspense, existing balance auto-deducted on next payment
Tested scenario: First payment 100K cheque for 80K request creates 20K suspense. Second payment 60K uses 20K from suspense (only 40K actual paid)
Returns project-wise breakdown with income, expenses (material, labour, vendor, total), profit for all projects
Returns pending approvals for income, materials, labour, vendor with summary counts and totals
Page loads with Total Income, Total Expense, Balance cards, Income by Mode breakdown, Income/Expenses tabs, Manual Expense button
Page loads with Petty Cash, Material Suspense, Labour Suspense cards, Petty Cash/Materials/Labour tabs, Process Payment button
Page loads with Total Income/Expense/Profit summary, project table with 13 rows showing all expense categories and profit
Page loads with Income/Materials/Labour/Suppliers summary cards and tabs, shows 'No pending approvals' when empty
Dialog opens with Project, Category, Description, Amount, Payment Method, Vendor Name fields and Record Expense button
Dialog opens with Payment Type, Payment Method, Vendor/Contractor, Requested Amount, Cheque Amount, Site Allocation, Remarks fields

issues: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent - minor accessibility warning (React console warning)

critical_code_review_comments: All Phase 2 endpoints properly return required data structures
Smart payment suspense tracking correctly handles excess and auto-deduction scenarios
All data-testid attributes properly set on new pages for testing
Frontend pages properly fetch data from new API endpoints
Suspense account 3-part system (Petty Cash, Material, Labour) correctly implemented

test_credentials.demo_login: admin@constructionos.com via Demo Access tab > Login as Demo User

seed_data_creation: Created test manual expenses and suspense payments during backend testing (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 financial features fully tested. All Cashbook, Suspense Account, Project Finance, and Approvals functionality working. Smart payment auto-deduction verified working. Pages accessible at /accountant-module (Cashbook), /suspense-account, /accountant-dashboard (Project Finance), /approvals.
